h4: Search ================================================== AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ================================================== h1: Custom A-Frame Sidewalk Signs for Outdoor Business Advertising h2: Durable Coroplast A-Frame Signs with Portable Hardware for Storefront Display h2: Order Custom A-Frame Signs for Outdoor Business Advertising h2: Coroplast Material for A-Frame Sign Durability h2: A-Frame Sign Finishing Options for Storefront Installation h2: Custom A-Frame Sign Production & Turnaround Times h2: A-Frame Sign Payment & Ordering Options h2: Shipping Options for A-Frame Sign Delivery h2: Outdoor Business Uses for A-Frame Signs h2: A-Frame Sign Artwork Requirements for Printing h2: Design & Order Custom A-Frame Signs Today h2: A-Frame Sign FAQ ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Custom A-Frame Sidewalk Signs for Outdoor Business Advertising ## Durable Coroplast A-Frame Signs with Portable Hardware for Storefront Display PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: 4 mm Coroplast Sign (2) with Simpo Sign Hardware Product: Complete A-Frame Kit with Signs Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 27" x 22" PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom A-Frame Signs for Outdoor Business Advertising

The Simpo Sign A-Frame Kit includes lightweight, portable hardware and two 27" x 22" full-color custom signs designed for outdoor business advertising. This durable sign system is perfect for storefronts, restaurants, retail locations, and promotional displays that need maximum visibility.

Each A-Frame kit features molded handles for easy transportation, allowing you to move your advertising display as needed throughout the day. The weather-resistant construction ensures your custom signs maintain their professional appearance in outdoor conditions.

The complete kit includes everything needed for immediate deployment: the A-Frame hardware and two custom-printed 27" x 22" signs. For double-sided printing options or custom sizing requirements, our customer service team can provide specialized solutions.

A-Frame Sign Benefits for Business Advertising

  • Lightweight yet durable construction for daily use
  • Portable design with built-in handles
  • Weather-resistant materials for outdoor durability
  • High-visibility 27" x 22" sign size
  • Complete kit with hardware and custom signs
  • Professional full-color digital printing
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Coroplast Material for A-Frame Sign Durability

Your A-Frame sign kit includes the Simpo Sign hardware and two 27" x 22" custom signs printed on durable 4mm Coroplast material, specifically chosen for outdoor business advertising applications.

4mm Coroplast Sign Material

Lightweight & Waterproof: Our 4mm Coroplast material provides the perfect balance of durability and portability for A-Frame signs. This waterproof plastic material resists weather damage while remaining light enough for easy daily handling.

Digital Print Quality: High-resolution digital printing on Coroplast delivers vibrant colors and sharp text that attracts customers and maintains professional appearance over time.

Weather Resistance: Coroplast material withstands rain, sun, and temperature changes, making it ideal for outdoor A-Frame sign applications where signs are exposed to the elements daily.

Request a free sample packet of materials to evaluate the quality and durability of our Coroplast material before ordering.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Finishing Options for Storefront Installation

Your A-Frame sign kit comes complete with professional finishing designed for immediate outdoor deployment at your business location.

Hardware & Mounting System

Simpo Sign A-Frame Hardware: Each kit includes the complete Simpo Sign A-Frame system, engineered for stability and portability. The frame accommodates two 27" x 22" signs for maximum advertising impact.

Built-in Handle Design: Molded handles allow easy transportation of your A-Frame sign system, enabling you to position and reposition your advertising display throughout the day as foot traffic patterns change.

Sign Installation & Setup

Quick Setup: Your custom signs install easily into the A-Frame system without tools, allowing for rapid deployment and storage.

Stable Base Design: The A-Frame configuration provides stable support for your signs in outdoor conditions while maintaining portability for indoor storage.

Double-Sided Options: For enhanced visibility, double-sided printing can be arranged through our customer service team to maximize your advertising coverage.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom A-Frame Sign Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production schedules for your A-Frame sign orders, allowing you to choose the timeline that best fits your advertising needs and schedule.

Production Time Options

2 Business Days Express

Need your A-Frame signs quickly? Our express option delivers professional results with rapid turnaround for urgent advertising needs.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day options available - contact customer service
  • Production time plus shipping time equals total delivery time
  • Turnaround begins when file upload completes or proof approval is received

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular production option combines speed with value - perfect for most A-Frame sign advertising campaigns.

  • Standard turnaround at no additional charge
  • Ideal balance of speed and cost-effectiveness
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency options available through customer service

5 Business Days Saver

When timing is flexible, choose our cost-saving option for your A-Frame sign production.

  • Most economical production option
  • Perfect for planned advertising campaigns
  • Same quality standards as faster options
  • Advanced planning saves on production costs
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Payment & Ordering Options

Secure payment processing ensures your A-Frame sign order moves smoothly into production with multiple convenient payment methods available.

Accepted Payment Methods

Credit Cards: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate processing of your A-Frame sign order.

Check Payments: Business customers can pay by check, which must be received before production begins. Learn more about check payment processing.

Payment Processing & Security

Pre-Production Payment: All A-Frame signs require payment before production begins, ensuring your order receives immediate attention once approved.

Secure Processing: Your credit card will not be charged until you have approved your final order and artwork, providing complete control over your purchase.

Order Approval Process: Review and approve your A-Frame sign design and order details before any charges are processed, ensuring complete satisfaction with your advertising investment.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for A-Frame Sign Delivery

Professional packaging and reliable shipping ensure your A-Frame sign kit arrives safely and ready for immediate business use.

Shipping Methods Available

  • Economy (5-10 Business Days): Cost-effective option for planned advertising campaigns
  • Standard (3-5 Business Days): Most popular shipping choice
  • Three Day (3 Business Days): Expedited delivery for urgent needs
  • Two Day (2 Business Days): Fast delivery option
  • Overnight (1 Business Day): Next-day delivery when time is critical

Shipping Guidelines & Policies

Order Tracking: Receive tracking information once your A-Frame sign package ships, allowing you to monitor delivery progress.

Shipping Costs: Determined by package weight and destination. Large orders may incur additional shipping charges due to size and weight of A-Frame hardware.

Damage Protection: Damaged items must be returned for replacement. Lost packages are replaced after shipping company confirms loss (typically 7-10 business days).

Economy Shipping Notes

When selecting economy shipping, include complete address information including P.O. Box numbers in the "Address Two" field to ensure successful delivery of your A-Frame sign kit.

International Shipping

International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS only. Contact customer service for international A-Frame sign shipping assistance.

Questions about shipping your A-Frame sign order? Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Outdoor Business Uses for A-Frame Signs

A-Frame signs provide versatile outdoor advertising solutions for businesses across all industries, delivering high-visibility marketing that attracts customers and drives foot traffic.

Retail & Storefront Advertising

Daily Specials & Promotions: Restaurants, cafes, and retail stores use A-Frame signs to advertise daily specials, sales events, and new product arrivals directly on sidewalks and storefronts.

Store Hours & Information: Display operating hours, contact information, and essential business details where customers can easily see them before entering your location.

Seasonal Campaigns: Promote holiday sales, seasonal menus, and limited-time offers with eye-catching A-Frame displays that can be updated regularly.

Service Business Applications

Professional Services: Law offices, medical practices, and consulting firms use A-Frame signs for directional signage, parking information, and professional branding.

Real Estate Marketing: Open house announcements, property information, and agent contact details displayed prominently for maximum visibility during showings.

Contractors & Trade Services: On-site advertising for construction companies, landscapers, and service providers working in residential and commercial areas.

Event & Temporary Advertising

Trade Shows & Markets: Portable A-Frame signs work perfectly for farmers markets, craft fairs, and trade show environments where setup and breakdown speed is essential.

Event Directional Signage: Guide attendees to parking areas, entrances, and specific locations during events and conferences.

Grand Openings: Generate buzz and attract attention for new business launches and grand opening celebrations.

Weather Resistance Benefits

The durable Coroplast material and sturdy hardware construction make these A-Frame signs ideal for year-round outdoor use, maintaining professional appearance through various weather conditions while providing reliable daily advertising performance.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Artwork Requirements for Printing

Professional artwork preparation ensures your A-Frame signs deliver maximum visual impact for your outdoor advertising campaigns.

Recommended File Formats

Vector Files: .eps files with fonts converted to outlines provide the best print quality for A-Frame signs, ensuring crisp text and graphics at the 27" x 22" size.

High-Resolution Options: .pdf, .tiff, or .jpg files at 300 dpi or higher resolution work well for A-Frame sign printing when vector files are not available.

File Size Limits: Upload files up to 60 MB directly through our system. For larger files, contact customer service for upload assistance to ensure fastest processing.

Design Considerations for A-Frame Signs

Readability Distance: Design text and graphics to be easily readable from typical sidewalk viewing distances. Bold fonts and high contrast colors work best for outdoor visibility.

Weather Exposure: Consider that your A-Frame signs will be displayed outdoors in various lighting conditions. Bright, contrasting colors maintain visibility in different weather and lighting situations.

Professional Design Assistance: Our graphic design team can help optimize your artwork for A-Frame sign printing if you're unsure about file quality or design effectiveness.

Proofing Options

Order Proofs: Request a proof to review your A-Frame sign design, order details, pricing, and shipping information before production begins. Production will not start until you approve the proof.

Color Match Proofs: For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate color reproduction for your A-Frame signs. Contact customer service for color matching requirements.

Design Services Available

If you need professional design assistance, our graphic design team can create custom artwork for your A-Frame signs. Upload reference materials and provide specific instructions for a completely custom design solution.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Custom A-Frame Signs Today

Start attracting more customers to your business with professional A-Frame signs that deliver powerful outdoor advertising impact. Our complete Simpo Sign A-Frame kit includes everything needed to launch your storefront marketing campaign immediately.

Complete A-Frame Sign Solution

Every kit includes durable hardware and two custom 27" x 22" signs printed on weather-resistant Coroplast material. The portable design with built-in handles makes it easy to position your advertising exactly where foot traffic is highest.

Fast Production & Delivery

Choose from 2, 3, or 5-day production options to meet your advertising timeline. Professional digital printing ensures vibrant colors and sharp text that maintains its impact through outdoor exposure.

Professional Design Support

Upload your own print-ready artwork or work with our design team to create compelling A-Frame sign graphics that drive customer engagement and business results.

Ready to Get Started?

Configure your A-Frame sign kit above with your preferred options, upload your artwork, and place your order. For questions about custom sizing, double-sided printing, or bulk orders, contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300.

Order your custom A-Frame signs today and start attracting more customers tomorrow.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign FAQ

What's included in the A-Frame sign kit?

Each kit includes the complete Simpo Sign A-Frame hardware and two custom-printed 27" x 22" signs. The hardware features built-in handles for easy transportation and setup.

What material are the signs printed on?

Signs are printed on 4mm Coroplast, a lightweight, waterproof plastic material that's ideal for outdoor use. This material resists weather damage while remaining easy to handle.

Can I get double-sided signs?

Yes, double-sided printing is available. Contact our customer service team to arrange double-sided printing for your A-Frame signs.

How do I transport and store the A-Frame?

The Simpo Sign hardware includes molded handles for easy carrying. The lightweight design allows one person to move it easily, and the frame can be folded for compact storage.

What file formats do you accept for artwork?

We accept .eps (with fonts converted to outlines), .pdf, high-resolution .tiff, and .jpg files. Vector files at 300 dpi or higher provide the best print quality.

How long will my A-Frame signs last outdoors?

The Coroplast material and UV-resistant inks are designed for extended outdoor use. Signs typically maintain good appearance for 1-2 years depending on weather exposure and usage.

What's the difference between production times?

Choose 2-day express for urgent orders, 3-day standard (most popular), or 5-day saver for cost savings. All options maintain the same quality standards.

Do you offer design services?

Yes, our professional design team can create custom artwork for your A-Frame signs. Simply select the design option and provide your requirements and reference materials.

How much do A-Frame signs weigh?

The complete kit is lightweight enough for easy daily handling while providing stable support for outdoor display. Exact weight varies but the system is designed for single-person operation.

Can I order replacement signs for my existing A-Frame?

Yes, replacement signs are available for existing Simpo Sign A-Frame hardware. Contact customer service to order additional signs for your frame.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
